items.visual_description: A structured, rectangular handbag made from a smooth black material, likely faux leather. It features two rolled top handles and a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap. All hardware, including the rectangular handle connectors, strap buckle, and a small brand plaque on the lower front, is a polished gold-tone metal. A single vertical seam runs down the center front of the bag.

overall_description: A classic black handbag is presented on a marble surface. The bag has a structured, elegant silhouette with clean lines, featuring both top handles and a longer shoulder strap for versatile carrying options. The design is accented with polished gold-tone hardware which contrasts beautifully with the deep black color of the bag.
